question: The scatterplot shows sales for individuals with different years of experience. Based on what can be reliably seen in the chart, which statement is most appropriate?

options.A: Individuals with more years of experience clearly achieve the highest sales.
options.B: It is difficult to determine precisely which experience level has the highest sales from this chart.
options.C: Individuals with the least experience definitely have the highest sales.
options.D: Sales are exactly the same for all experience levels shown.

explanation: The individuals in the chart between the ages of 30 and 35 have the highest sales. The small size of the chart may cause difficulty in accurately identifying the specific trends of sales in certain age ranges.
